reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
At night there are long delays in service, 20 minutes in front of the pump to fill up

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Podes leer el diario en papel. Y muy espacioso

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. You can read the newspaper in print. And it's very spacious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1enMzX1J3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en playa. Pero el minishop es un asco rotundo desde que cambió de dueños: vajilla vieja y sucia, comidas baratas de dudosa calidad y conservación, en vez de café ahora sirven barro. ES MUY EVIDENTE EL DESASTRE!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service on the beach. But the convenience store has been a complete mess since it changed owners: old and dirty dishes, cheap food of dubious quality and preservation, and instead of coffee, they now serve mud. THE DISASTER IS OBVIOUSLY OBVIOUS!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBcGNMM29BRRAB
